summary: Iteration 109: validity_days feature for habits - All tests PASSED. Backend 8/8 tests passed. Frontend verified: Admin can create/edit habits with 'Valid for (days)' field, habits list shows Xd validity badge, Daily Habits page shows 'Signal unlocked for X days' text and 'Valid until' date when gate is unlocked.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ HabitCreate model includes validity_days: int = 1 (line 25-26 routes/habits.py)
✅ Admin create/update habit saves validity_days with max(1, value) validation
✅ GET /api/habits/ calculates gate_deadline based on validity_days window
✅ Frontend HabitManagerCard.jsx has 'Valid for (days)' input with data-testid='habit-validity-days'
✅ Frontend shows Xd badge on habits with validity > 1 day
✅ HabitTrackerPage.jsx shows 'Signal unlocked for X days' text on completed gate habits
✅ Signal Unlocked badge shows 'Valid until' date when gate_deadline exists
✅ Save button has loading spinner during save operation (Loader2 component)
✅ Error toast now shows actual backend error detail instead of generic message
seed_data_creation: Created 4 TEST_ prefixed habits during testing, all deactivated after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: validity_days feature is fully implemented and working. Admin can set 1-365 days validity for habits. When a member completes a gate habit, the signal stays unlocked for validity_days. Frontend shows 'Signal unlocked for X days' on completed habits and 'Valid until {date}' on the Signal Unlocked badge. Existing habits: 'Send 1 invite today' (1 day default), 'Send 1 invite this week' (5 days validity).

verified_features.verification: POST /api/admin/habits accepts validity_days, stores in DB, returns in response

verified_features.feature: Admin: Habit list shows validity badge
verified_features.verification: Frontend shows Xd badge (e.g., '5d') on habits with validity > 1
Input has data-testid='habit-validity-days', default value 1, type=number

verified_features.feature: Member: gate_unlocked based on validity window
verified_features.verification: GET /api/habits/ checks if completion within validity_days window

verified_features.feature: Member: 'Signal unlocked for X days' text
verified_features.verification: HabitTrackerPage shows text on completed gate habits with validity > 1

verified_features.feature: Member: 'Valid until' date on Signal Unlocked badge
verified_features.verification: Badge shows 'Valid until {date}' when gate_deadline exists
Toast shows actual backend error detail, save button has loading spinner
